languages.original_text: "The overt study of artefacts of xenotic origin is deemed a malign breach of data-hygiene restrictions. I demand the immediate seizure and subsequent isolation in stasis containers of all samples."

languages.text: "Открытое изучение артефактов ксенотического происхождения признается злонамеренным попранием границ инфогигиены. Настаиваю на немедленном изъятии всех образцов с последующей изоляцией в стазис-контейнерах".
"The overt study of artefacts of xenotic origin is deemed a malign breach of data-hygiene restrictions. I demand the immediate seizure and subsequent isolation in stasis containers of all samples."
languages.original_text: "Открытое изучение артефактов ксенотического происхождения признается злонамеренным попранием границ инфогигиены. Настаиваю на немедленном изъятии всех образцов с последующей изоляцией в стазис-контейнерах".

traits.locale_text: "The overt study of artefacts of xenotic origin is deemed a malign breach of data-hygiene restrictions. I demand the immediate seizure and subsequent isolation in stasis containers of all samples."
"The overt study of artefacts of xenotic origin is deemed a malign breach of data-hygiene restrictions. I demand the immediate seizure and subsequent isolation in stasis containers of all samples."
"The overt study of artefacts of xenotic origin is deemed a malign breach of data-hygiene restrictions. I demand the immediate seizure and subsequent isolation in stasis containers of all samples."

languages.text: «El estudio abierto de los artefactos de origen xenos se considera una brecha maliciosa de las restricciones de higiene de datos. Exijo la incautación y subsecuente aislamiento en contenedores de estasis de todas las muestras».
languages.original_text: "The overt study of artefacts of xenotic origin is deemed a malign breach of data-hygiene restrictions. I demand the immediate seizure and subsequent isolation in stasis containers of all samples."

traits.locale_text: «El estudio abierto de los artefactos de origen xenos se considera una brecha maliciosa de las restricciones de higiene de datos. Exijo la incautación y subsecuente aislamiento en contenedores de estasis de todas las muestras».

languages.text: 「異種起源の遺物を公然と研究することは、データ衛生規定の悪質な違反とみなされます。自分は、全標本の即時押収と、その後のステイシス・コンテナへの隔離を要求します」
languages.original_text: "The overt study of artefacts of xenotic origin is deemed a malign breach of data-hygiene restrictions. I demand the immediate seizure and subsequent isolation in stasis containers of all samples."

traits.locale_text: 「異種起源の遺物を公然と研究することは、データ衛生規定の悪質な違反とみなされます。自分は、全標本の即時押収と、その後のステイシス・コンテナへの隔離を要求します」

languages.text: “公开研究源自异形的造物，视为严重违反数据卫生条例。我要求立刻没收所有样本，并将其封存于静滞容器中隔离保存。”
languages.original_text: "The overt study of artefacts of xenotic origin is deemed a malign breach of data-hygiene restrictions. I demand the immediate seizure and subsequent isolation in stasis containers of all samples."

traits.locale_text: “公开研究源自异形的造物，视为严重违反数据卫生条例。我要求立刻没收所有样本，并将其封存于静滞容器中隔离保存。”

languages.text: "Das unverhohlene Studium von Artefakten xenotischen Ursprungs ist ein heftiger Verstoß gegen die Richtlinien zur Datenhygiene. Ich verlange die sofortige Isolation aller Proben in Stasebehältern."
languages.original_text: "The overt study of artefacts of xenotic origin is deemed a malign breach of data-hygiene restrictions. I demand the immediate seizure and subsequent isolation in stasis containers of all samples."

traits.locale_text: "Das unverhohlene Studium von Artefakten xenotischen Ursprungs ist ein heftiger Verstoß gegen die Richtlinien zur Datenhygiene. Ich verlange die sofortige Isolation aller Proben in Stasebehältern."

languages.text: « L'étude des artefacts d'origine xénos est considérée comme une grave infraction des restrictions d'hygiène. Je demande la saisie immédiate des échantillons et leur mise à l'isolement dans des conteneurs de stase. »
languages.original_text: "The overt study of artefacts of xenotic origin is deemed a malign breach of data-hygiene restrictions. I demand the immediate seizure and subsequent isolation in stasis containers of all samples."

traits.locale_text: « L'étude des artefacts d'origine xénos est considérée comme une grave infraction des restrictions d'hygiène. Je demande la saisie immédiate des échantillons et leur mise à l'isolement dans des conteneurs de stase. »

languages.text: "Zeno kökenli yadigârların aleni bir şekilde incelenmesi, veri hijyeni kısıtlamalarının kötü niyetli bir ihlali olarak kabul edilmektedir. Tüm numunelere derhâl el konulmasını ve ardından staz konteynerlerinde izole edilmesini talep ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "The overt study of artefacts of xenotic origin is deemed a malign breach of data-hygiene restrictions. I demand the immediate seizure and subsequent isolation in stasis containers of all samples."

traits.locale_text: "Zeno kökenli yadigârların aleni bir şekilde incelenmesi, veri hijyeni kısıtlamalarının kötü niyetli bir ihlali olarak kabul edilmektedir. Tüm numunelere derhâl el konulmasını ve ardından staz konteynerlerinde izole edilmesini talep ediyorum."
